constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance remains non-authoritative and cannot approve.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates review and proposal evidence, then records explicit human authorization.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not approval authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Improvement approval recorded and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Improvement Approval Runtime records approval decisions only.
Approved decisions authorize future implementation planning but do not perform planning.
Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from approved improvements is not implemented.
Reflection, self-modification, self-improvement, and self-application remain out of scope.
